production_command.expanded: sglang generate --backend=sglang --model-path=Lightricks/LTX-2.3 --prompt="A beautiful sunset over the ocean" --seed=1234 --negative-prompt=<ltx23-one-stage preset negative prompt> --width=768 --height=512 --num-frames=121 --fps=24 --num-inference-steps=30 --guidance-scale=3.0 --num-gpus=2 --save-output --warmup --enable-torch-compile --perf-dump-path <json>

max_autotune_attempt.notes: Reached inductor autotune and emitted Triton resource-OOM choices that were ignored, but did not produce ltx23-one-stage_max.json before the sweep was stopped to avoid running the remaining heavy extra presets.
